protein_name: Inhibitor of the Wnt signaling pathway. Down-regulates beta-catenin. Probably facilitate the phosphorylation of beta-catenin and APC by GSK3B. Expressed in brain and lymphoblast. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
